---

# Thief Balance Reference

## Resource Profile
| Max Stamina | Max Mana | Stam Regen/s | Mana Regen/s |
|-------------|----------|--------------|--------------|
| 45 | 30 | 1.8 | 1.2 |

**Identity:** Hybrid resource user (stamina-leaning). Uses both mana and stamina. Stealth, evade, and burst windows define gameplay.

---

| Equipment | Mana | Stam | CD(s) | Effect (Base→Upgraded) | Type |
|-----------|------|------|-------|------------------------|------|
| Basic Dark Arts | — | — | — | +10→15 dark dmg; +2→3 insanity stacks | Passive |

### Common Baselines
- Cost: 0–20 mana, 0–20 stamina
- Cooldown: 5–21s
- Direct damage: 80–240 total (often multi-hit or conditional)
- Shields: 3–5 per tick (smoke bomb type)
- Efficiency: 8–12 dmg/stam, ~12–24 dmg/mana

### Uncommon Baselines
- Cost: 0–30 mana, 0–35 stamina
- Cooldown: 2–25s
- Direct damage: 100–450 (burst abilities)
- Mana efficiency: 10–15 dmg/mana
- High variance: burst actives vs. incremental passives

### Archetype Groups (Uncommon)
- **Stealth/Evade**: Dodge Roll, Fade, Sidestep, Untouchable, Vanish, Form a Plan, Silent Steps II
- **Poison**: Acid Bomb, Crippling Poison, Endless Venom, Envenom II, Expunge, Piercing Venom, Plague
- **Dark/Insanity**: Atrophy, Confidence Kill, Curse Mark, Dark Lance, Darkness, Disorient, Farewell, Night Shade
- **Lightning/Electrified**: Energize, Lightning Rush, Overload
- **Burst Physical**: Contaminate, Counter, Disappear, First Strike, Five Point Strike, Vital Pierce

### Rare Baselines
- Cost: 0–30 mana, 0–40 stamina
- Cooldown: 2–15s (short burst windows)
- Direct damage: 125–500 (single target burst), 340–500 (passive procs)
- Many are combined versions of uncommon passives or scaling mechanics

---

## Key Balance Patterns

### Cost Economy
- Hybrid: uses both mana (0–30) and stamina (0–35)
- Many 0-cost passives and mark abilities (free setup)
- Burst windows cost significantly (Contaminate: 30M + 30S, Night Shade: 25M + 35S)
- High-cost actives are justified by very high damage (300–600+)

### Damage Scaling by Rarity
| Rarity | Burst (single) | Multi-hit Total | AoE/Zone Total |
|--------|---------------|-----------------|----------------|
| Common | 80–150 | 130–240 | 40–60/tick |
| Uncommon | 150–450 | 200–450 | 60–150/tick |
| Rare | 150–500 | 340–570 | 85–175/tick |
| Epic | 200–1050+ | 750+ | 150–350 per proc |

### Upgrade Patterns
- Damage: +40–50%
- Status stacks: +50%
- Cooldown: -25–30%
- Multipliers: +0.2 (e.g., ×1.4→×1.6)
- Thresholds: lowered by 25–35%
- Stealth/evade duration: +2–5s
